_instructions: All paths can be relative (resolved against FormFiller.exe folder) or absolute.
Default folders are siblings of FormFiller.exe, so the app stays portable.
customer_workbook can be .xlsx or .xlsm. The app reads saved/calculated values.
Source PDF paths in source_forms.json are relative to forms_folder unless absolute.
RM info (name, staff_id, fimm_id, ippc_id, branches) lives in data/clients.xlsx -> RM_Profile sheet.
Y coordinates in forms.json are from the BOTTOM of the page (A4 bottom=0, top=842).
On every launch, the previous settings.json is copied to config/backups/ with a timestamp.
